name: ship-guard
one_liner: A one-command, local-first 'are you about to get ransacked?' safety check for any git repo — installable as a pre-push hook.
status: LIVE — public GitHub repo (2026-06-25); CI green; LICENSE MIT
notes: Local-first CLI + git pre-push hook. Packaged from the 2026-06-19 repo/account security audit. Code lives OUTSIDE this repo in its own public repo (github.com/hamza-ali-shahjahan/ship-guard); local clone at ~/Claude/ShipGuard, absolute path in gitignored code-paths.local.json under slug 'ship-guard' (code_path null per path-portability rule). Name 'ship-guard' kept deliberately after clearance: the GitHub repo name is free and accurate; npm publishing (if ever) must be scoped (@hamzaali/ship-guard) since plain 'shipguard' exists. NOT on npm — distributed via git clone / npx github:. Mirrors the repolish layout.

launch.state: public GitHub repo, MIT, CI green

traction.state: 25 GitHub stars OR 3 external users reporting a real catch (source: GitHub)
